items.name: First Kalima — Tayyibah
items.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ، مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ
items.en: There is none worthy of worship except Allah; Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.

items.name: Second Kalima — Shahadah
items.ar: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
items.tr: Ash-hadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan abduhu wa rasuluh.
items.en: I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship except Allah alone with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.

items.name: Third Kalima — Tamjeed
items.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ، وَاللهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
items.tr: Subhanallah, walhamdu lillah, wa la ilaha illallah, wallahu akbar, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
items.en: Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, there is none worthy of worship except Allah, Allah is the Greatest, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
items.src: Sahih Muslim / Sahih al-Bukhari dhikr phrases

items.name: Fourth Kalima — Tawheed
items.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ، وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.tr: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa ala kulli shay’in qadir.
items.en: There is none worthy of worship except Allah alone with no partner. His is dominion and praise, and He is able to do all things.

items.name: Fifth Kalima — Istighfar
items.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ، وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
items.tr: Astaghfirullahal-ladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum wa atubu ilayh.
items.en: Forgiveness is sought from Allah, besides whom there is none worthy of worship, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer, and repentance is made to Him.
items.timing: General supplication unless a specific timing is stated in the source

items.name: Sixth Kalima — Protection from Shirk
items.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لَا أَعْلَمُ
items.tr: Allahumma inni a’udhu bika an ushrika bika wa ana a’lam, wa astaghfiruka lima la a’lam.
items.en: O Allah, refuge is sought in You from knowingly associating anything with You, and Your forgiveness is sought for what is not known.
